title: International Law
rationale: The definitive single-volume textbook reviewing all major domains of public international law. Shaw's 8th edition (2017, CUP, ISBN 9781107188471, 1118pp) is universally adopted in top law schools (Cambridge, Oxford, NYU, LSE) and cited in ICJ pleadings. Hardback ISBN verified via Google Books (1118pp), Amazon (1118pp), Wildy's Legal Bookshop, and Cambridge Core. Selected as the root foundational textbook for the international-law leaf.
